artifact.title: Generate invoice from job costs

story.goal: Generate an invoice from accumulated project costs — labor, materials, and approved change orders — so it can be delivered to the client for payment.
steps: The admin selects a project that has accumulated time logs, material usage, and approved change orders.
The system computes the billing summary: labor cost from approved time logs, material cost from material usage records, and change order amount from approved change orders only.
The admin reviews the consolidated cost breakdown and confirms the figures are accurate.
The admin optionally provides a client email and internal notes, then confirms generation.
The system creates the invoice in draft status with all calculated amounts in USD.
story.outcome: A new invoice record exists in draft status with laborCost, materialCost, changeOrderAmount, and totalAmount calculated from project data, ready to be reviewed and issued to the client.

inputs.description: The project to generate an invoice for, selected by the admin on the billing summary screen.
Optional email address for delivering the invoice to the client.
Optional internal notes about the invoice.
System-generated unique identifier for the new invoice record.
Initial lifecycle status of the invoice, always set to draft on creation.
Currency code for all monetary figures, always USD.
Timestamp when the invoice record is created.
Timestamp when the invoice record is last updated, set to creation time.
Total labor cost accumulated from approved time logs on the project.
Total material cost accumulated from material usage records on the project.
Total amount from approved change orders on the project.
Calculated total of labor cost plus material cost plus approved change order amounts.

contextResolution.description: Resolved from the project the admin selected on the billing summary screen; the backend reads the selected project context.
Backend generates a new UUID for the invoice record at creation time.
New invoices always start in draft status per the invoice lifecycle; the backend sets this constant at creation time.
Currency is always USD per domain rule allFiguresUsdNoTax; the backend sets this constant regardless of locale.
Backend sets the creation timestamp to the current server time.
Backend sets the last-updated timestamp to the current server time at creation.
Backend sums the cost of all approved time logs for the project to compute total labor cost.
Backend sums the cost of all material usage records for the project to compute total material cost.
Backend sums amounts from change orders with approved status only for the project, excluding pending or rejected change orders.
Backend calculates totalAmount as laborCost plus materialCost plus changeOrderAmount per the invoiceCalculation rule.

acceptanceAssertions: After generation the invoice exists with status draft and a system-generated invoiceId.
The invoice totalAmount equals laborCost plus materialCost plus changeOrderAmount.
The invoice laborCost is the sum of all approved time log costs for the selected project.
The invoice materialCost is the sum of all material usage costs for the selected project.
The invoice changeOrderAmount includes only change orders with approved status; pending or rejected change orders are excluded.
All monetary figures on the invoice are expressed in USD with currency set to usd.
No tax calculation is performed or stored on the invoice.
The invoice is informational and does not initiate or process any payment.
The invoice is associated with the selected project via projectId.
